channel.title: Text-Processing on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Text-Processing on Arrans github.io

item.title: pemistahl/lingua-go
item.description: The most accurate natural language detection library for Go, suitable for short text and mixed-language text

item.title: AllenDang/PipeIt
item.description: PipeIt is a text transformation, conversion, cleansing and extraction tool.
